title: Housing support grant-funded services: privacy notice
body: "The housing support grant provides funding for people to access and stay in housing, while improving their recovery from drug and alcohol use.  This privacy notice is for anyone receiving this grant-funded housing support. It describes how we collect and use your personal information, including:   what we do with your information how we protect your information and keep it secure how to contact us or make a complaint   We collect your information so we can understand if the housing support grant is working well and make sure we are improving the lives of people affected by drug and alcohol misuse. "
